violations.text: Various beverages were observed stored on the floor in the retail area and walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
